display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: Adapters are used to extract the data from a specific source. The data is loaded to correspond to a given unified format.
Different folder/data structures require their own adapter

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 367px; margin-left: 342px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 176px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: The extractor handles the different adapters and parametrezises the corresponding extrat functions of the adapters.
The extractor also concatenates all loaded data and samples into a single dataset of format X,y.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 417px; margin-left: 882px;

div.p: The model factory creates a machine learning model using the provided dataset.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 597px; margin-left: 882px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 116px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
